allow: PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "password"; $psql = \(Get-Command psql -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(-not $psql\) { Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\' -Recurse -Filter psql.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { $psql = $_.FullName } }; "psql: $psql"; if \($psql\) { & $psql -U postgres -h localhost -d AMIS229 -c "SELECT table_schema, table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name ILIKE 'PropertyItemCatalog%';" })
